positive: A detailed, symmetrical, stylized depiction of a mystical forest scene with glowing bioluminescent flora and fauna. The main subject is a central, majestic ancient tree with intricate root systems that form a symmetrical base. Complementing this, highly stylized woodland creatures (e.g., fox, owl, deer) are integrated into the scene's negative space, outlined with clean, strong contrast lines. The palette should be dominated by deep indigo, emerald green, sapphire blue, and accented by luminous gold and cyan glow. Style should be high-detail enamel pin art meets modern woodcut illustration, favoring thick, clean lines, clear silhouettes, and a harmonious, mystical atmosphere. Composition must be central and perfectly circular for seamless print placement. Studio lighting, maximal detail, perfect symmetry, centered composition, high saturation, crisp lines.
negative: blurry, out of focus, artifacts, low detail, noisy, sketch, photorealistic, text, watermark, logo, trademark, extra limbs, bad anatomy, messy, messy background, asymmetrical
